query: sickly yellow green tint photograph unhealthy skin tone
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — yellow/green sickly tints, jaundice and unhealthy color casts

response.objective_caption: A side-profile portrait of a woman with long, wavy blonde hair wearing a shiny metallic gold jacket. She is positioned against a completely black background and faces to the right. A narrow beam of warm side light illuminates part of her face, revealing one eye, her nose, lips, and jawline, while scattered strands of hair catch the light across the frame. Her hand is visible near the bottom edge, grasping the jacket's collar.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A side-profile portrait of a woman with long, wavy blonde hair wearing a shiny metallic gold jacket, captured with deliberate underexposure that crushes the background and much of the subject into deep, featureless black shadow. Positioned against an entirely black backdrop, she faces right while a narrow beam of warm side light illuminates half of her face, revealing one eye, her nose, lips, and jawline, while the remainder recedes into opaque darkness. Scattered strands of hair catch the light throughout the frame, and her hand is visible near the bottom edge, grasping the jacket's collar.
